_meta.description: NAS tier budget allocation based on project analysis and baseline results
_meta.note: Baseline latency (0.12ms) is well below target (0.5ms), so budget prioritizes accuracy/architecture exploration over latency reduction

budget_allocation.label: Quick Screening
budget_allocation.rationale: Ultra-fast sieve to eliminate obviously poor architectures. Even 1 epoch gives useful signal on this simple synthetic dataset (800 samples).

budget_allocation.label: Medium Evaluation
budget_allocation.rationale: Moderate training for promising candidates. 3x baseline epoch gives better accuracy discrimination without excessive cost.

budget_allocation.label: Full Training
budget_allocation.rationale: Full training matching the project's default epoch count (5). Used for top candidates to get final reliable accuracy estimates.
